_comment: Populated by AGENT-CONTRACTS on Day 1 deploy. Every other agent reads from this file. Do not hardcode addresses anywhere else. Rewrite this file on every redeploy.
_note: Clawforger is all-in on 0G. iNFTs, registry, royalty vault, and a mock USDC (mUSDC) we deploy ourselves all live on 0G Galileo testnet. No second chain.

x402._facilitatorNote: We run our own minimal x402 facilitator (packages/x402-facilitator) since no public facilitator exists on 0G yet. The Day-0 task is to verify on-chain receipts of mUSDC transfers. This is a strong FEEDBACK item for the x402 Foundation.

keeperhub._zgSupportNote: Verify on Day 0 that KeeperHub supports 0G Galileo testnet (chainId 16602). Their docs list 'Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, and other EVM-compatible chains' — 0G is EVM-compatible but not explicitly named. If unsupported, file feature request and use the explicit feedback as a KeeperHub Builder Feedback Bounty submission.
